response.global_summary: A video featuring Inugami Korone and Houshou Marine talking and performing a song together. The song is titled 'Nobishiro' (のびしろ), composed by DJ Matsunaga, and performed by Inugami Korone and Houshou Marine.

scenes.description: Inugami Korone and Houshou Marine talk and interact with each other and their band on stage.
The song 'Nobishiro' (のびしろ) begins, performed by Inugami Korone and Houshou Marine with band support. On-screen text indicates 'Nobishiro' (のびしろ) and 'Lyrics/Composer: DJ Matsunaga' (作詞・作曲 : DJ松永).
